response.justification: Candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and a strong track record of learning new technologies, but has a significant technical gap: C++ experience is limited and dated (last work in 2015), while the role requires modern C++ as the primary tool. Current role is focused on web/full-stack development rather than systems programming, suggesting potential skill drift in the required area. Could potentially transition, but is not an ideal fit for a mid-senior individual contributor who should be productive immediately.
strengths: Deep geospatial and mapping domain expertise through GISCollective and Green Map work, directly relevant to routing tile systems
Proven ability to master diverse technology stacks and learn quickly, demonstrated across 15+ years spanning web, embedded, and systems work
High-performance systems experience at Dunnhumby with microservices handling millions of requests/second and low-latency async I/O patterns
concerns: Significant C++ experience gap—last C++ work was 2015 for embedded components; role requires modern C++ production development
No Rust experience despite it being an acceptable alternative; current focus is TypeScript/Node.js, far from systems programming
Limited evidence of deep distributed systems knowledge (fault tolerance, consistency, service discovery) or data pipeline infrastructure work at scale
